Here is the complete summary of all TODO comments found across the **webapp** project:

---

## 📋 Webapp — Remaining TODO Work Items

**2 TODOs found across 2 files**

---

### 1. `webapp/docs/README.md` — Line 28
A high-level backlog section listing four outstanding features:

| # | Work Item |
|---|-----------|
| 1 | **Add database persistence** — the app currently uses an in-memory store only |
| 2 | **Add authentication middleware** — no auth layer exists yet |
| 3 | **Add input validation on POST** — POST requests are not validated |
| 4 | **Add pagination for user listing** — the GET endpoint returns all users with no paging |

---

### 2. `webapp/src/UsersController.scala` — Line 20
An inline code TODO inside the `POST` branch of the users route handler:

```scala
case "POST" =>
    // TODO: parse body, validate, add user
    Response(201, """{"status":"created"}""")
```

The `POST /users` handler is a **stub** — it always returns `201 Created` without actually:
- Parsing the request body
- Validating the incoming user data
- Inserting the user into the in-memory (or future database) store

---

### Summary

| File | Line | Work Item |
|------|------|-----------|
| `docs/README.md` | 28 | Add database persistence (replace in-memory store) |
| `docs/README.md` | 28 | Add authentication middleware |
| `docs/README.md` | 28 | Add input validation on POST endpoints |
| `docs/README.md` | 28 | Add pagination for the user listing endpoint |
| `src/UsersController.scala` | 20 | Implement POST body parsing, validation, and user insertion |

**5 concrete work items remain**, all clustered around the `UsersController` and the missing infrastructure (auth, persistence, pagination, validation).
